47	    arch = 90
48	
49	    def __init__(
50	        self,
51	        dtype: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
52	        head_dim: int,
53	        head_dim_v: Optional[int] = None,
54	        qhead_per_kvhead: int = 1,
55	        is_causal: bool = False,
56	        is_local: bool = False,
57	        deterministic: bool = False,
58	        tile_m: int = 64,
59	        tile_n: int = 128,
60	        Q_stage: int = 2,
61	        dO_stage: int = 2,
62	        PdS_stage: int = 2,
63	        SdP_swapAB: bool = False,
64	        dKV_swapAB: bool = False,
65	        dQ_swapAB: bool = False,
66	        AtomLayoutMSdP: int = 1,
67	        AtomLayoutNdKV: int = 2,
68	        AtomLayoutMdQ: int = 1,
69	        num_threads: int = 384,
70	        V_in_regs: bool = False,
71	        score_mod: cutlass.Constexpr | None = None,
72	        score_mod_bwd: cutlass.Constexpr | None = None,
73	        mask_mod: cutlass.Constexpr | None = None,
74	        has_aux_tensors: cutlass.Constexpr = False,
75	        q_subtile_factor: cutlass.Constexpr[int] = 1,
76	        dQ_single_wg: bool = False,
77	    ):
78	        self.dtype = dtype
79	        # padding head_dim to a multiple of 16 as k_block_size
80	        hdim_multiple_of = 16
81	        self.tile_hdim = int(math.ceil(head_dim / hdim_multiple_of) * hdim_multiple_of)
82	        head_dim_v = head_dim_v if head_dim_v is not None else head_dim
83	        self.same_hdim_kv = head_dim == head_dim_v
84	        self.tile_hdimv = int(math.ceil(head_dim_v / hdim_multiple_of) * hdim_multiple_of)
85	        # Can save registers (and hence be faster) if we don't have to check hdim predication
86	        self.check_hdim_oob = head_dim != self.tile_hdim
87	        self.check_hdim_v_oob = head_dim_v != self.tile_hdimv
88	        self.qhead_per_kvhead = qhead_per_kvhead
89	        self.is_causal = is_causal
90	        self.is_local = is_local
91	        self.deterministic = deterministic
92	        self.tile_m = tile_m
93	        self.tile_n = tile_n
94	        self.num_threads = num_threads
95	        self.Q_stage = Q_stage
96	        self.dO_stage = dO_stage
97	        self.PdS_stage = PdS_stage
98	        assert self.dO_stage in [1, self.Q_stage]
99	        assert self.PdS_stage in [1, self.Q_stage]
100	        self.SdP_swapAB = SdP_swapAB
101	        self.dKV_swapAB = dKV_swapAB
102	        self.dQ_swapAB = dQ_swapAB
103	        self.AtomLayoutMSdP = AtomLayoutMSdP
104	        self.AtomLayoutNdKV = AtomLayoutNdKV
105	        self.AtomLayoutMdQ = AtomLayoutMdQ
106	        self.num_wg_mma = (self.num_threads // 128) - 1
107	        self.mma_dkv_is_rs = (
108	            AtomLayoutMSdP == 1
109	            and AtomLayoutNdKV == self.num_wg_mma
110	            and SdP_swapAB
111	            and not dKV_swapAB
112	        )
113	        self.V_in_regs = V_in_regs
114	        # May be overridden in __call__ for varlen inputs.
115	        if qhead_per_kvhead > 1:
116	            assert self.same_hdim_kv, "GQA backward requires head_dim == head_dim_v"
117	            assert self.num_wg_mma == 2, "GQA backward assumes 2 warp groups"
118	        # These are tuned for speed
119	        # Do we keep the LSE and dPsum in each thread, or split them across 8 threads that share
120	        # them and then shuffle to get the value whenever we need? This can reduce register
121	        # pressure when SdP_swapAB, where each thread needs to keep statistics for (kBlockM / 4)
122	        # rows. If !SdP_swapAB, each thread only needs to keep statistics for 2 rows.
123	        self.shuffle_LSE = self.SdP_swapAB and self.tile_hdim <= 64
124	        self.shuffle_dPsum = self.SdP_swapAB and self.tile_hdim <= 64
125	
126	        self.buffer_align_bytes = 1024
127	
128	        self.score_mod = score_mod
129	        self.score_mod_bwd = score_mod_bwd
130	        self.mask_mod = mask_mod
131	        self.has_aux_tensors = has_aux_tensors
132	        self.q_subtile_factor = q_subtile_factor
133	        if cutlass.const_expr(has_aux_tensors):
134	            self.vec_size: cutlass.Constexpr = 1
135	        else:
136	            self.vec_size: cutlass.Constexpr = 4
137	        self.qk_acc_dtype = Float32
138	        # dQ_single_wg: WG0 computes the full dQ GEMM, WG1 skips it.
139	        # Only valid for 2 MMA warp groups.
140	        # Credit: Ben Spector
141	        if dQ_single_wg:
142	            assert self.num_wg_mma == 2, "dQ_single_wg only supports 2 warp groups"
143	        self.num_wg_dQ = 1 if dQ_single_wg else self.num_wg_mma
144	
145	    @staticmethod
146	    def can_implement(
147	        dtype,
148	        head_dim,
149	        head_dim_v,
150	        tile_m,
151	        tile_n,
152	        Q_stage,
153	        num_threads,
154	        V_in_regs=False,
155	    ) -> bool:
156	        if dtype not in [cutlass.Float16, cutlass.BFloat16]:
157	            return False
158	        if head_dim % 8 != 0:
159	            return False
160	        if head_dim_v % 8 != 0:
161	            return False
162	        if tile_n % 16 != 0:
163	            return False
164	        if num_threads % 32 != 0:
165	            return False
166	        if (tile_m * 2) % num_threads != 0:
167	            return False
168	        return True
169	
170	    def _check_type(
171	        self,
172	        mQ_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
173	        mK_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
174	        mV_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
175	        mdO_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
176	        mLSE_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
177	        mdPsum_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
178	        mdQaccum_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
179	        mdK_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
180	        mdV_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
181	    ):
182	        # Get the data type and check if it is fp16 or bf16
183	        if const_expr(not (mQ_type == mK_type == mV_type == mdO_type)):
184	            raise TypeError("All tensors must have the same data type")
185	        if const_expr(mQ_type not in [cutlass.Float16, cutlass.BFloat16]):
186	            raise TypeError("Only Float16 or BFloat16 is supported")
187	        if const_expr(mLSE_type not in [Float32]):
188	            raise TypeError("LSE tensor must be Float32")
189	        if const_expr(mdPsum_type not in [Float32]):
190	            raise TypeError("dPsum tensor must be Float32")
191	        if const_expr(mdQaccum_type not in [Float32]):
192	            raise TypeError("dQaccum tensor must be Float32")
193	        if const_expr(self.qhead_per_kvhead == 1):
194	            if const_expr(not (mdK_type == mdV_type == mQ_type)):
195	                raise TypeError("mdK and mdV tensors must have the same data type as mQ")
196	        else:
197	            if const_expr(not (mdK_type == mdV_type == Float32)):
198	                raise TypeError("mdKaccum and mdVaccum tensors must have the data type Float32")
199	        assert mQ_type == self.dtype
200	
201	    def _setup_attributes(self):
202	        # We need to accommodate both Q and Q^T (and dO and dO^T) in shared memory.
203	        # Q & dO are used in the SdP Mma and Q^T and dO^T are used in the dKV Mma.
204	        # The M dimension (tile_m) doesn't matter for the layout, only the K dimension
205	        wg_d_dKV = self.num_wg_mma // self.AtomLayoutNdKV
206	        self.sQ_layout, self.sdO_layout = [
207	            # Need to set major_mode_size (mms) to accommodate Q and Q.T
208	            sm90_utils.make_smem_layout(
209	                self.dtype,
210	                LayoutEnum.ROW_MAJOR,
211	                shape,
212	                stage,
213	                major_mode_size=mms,
214	            )
215	            for shape, stage, mms in [
216	                ((self.tile_m, self.tile_hdim), self.Q_stage, self.tile_hdim // wg_d_dKV),
217	                ((self.tile_m, self.tile_hdimv), self.dO_stage, self.tile_hdim // wg_d_dKV),
218	            ]
219	        ]
220	        wg_d_dQ = self.num_wg_dQ // self.AtomLayoutMdQ
221	        # Accomodate both K and K.T
222	        self.sK_layout = sm90_utils.make_smem_layout(
223	            self.dtype,
224	            LayoutEnum.ROW_MAJOR,
225	            (self.tile_n, self.tile_hdim),
226	            stage=None,
227	            major_mode_size=self.tile_hdim // wg_d_dQ,
228	        )
229	        # There's only V, no V.T, so layout is normal
230	        self.sV_layout = sm90_utils.make_smem_layout(
231	            self.dtype, LayoutEnum.ROW_MAJOR, (self.tile_n, self.tile_hdimv), None
232	        )
233	        # Accomodate both S and S.T
234	        wg_n_SdP = self.num_wg_mma // self.AtomLayoutMSdP
235	        wg_n_dKV = self.AtomLayoutNdKV
236	        self.sPdS_layout = sm90_utils.make_smem_layout(
237	            self.dtype,
238	            LayoutEnum.ROW_MAJOR,
239	            (self.tile_m, self.tile_n),
240	            stage=self.PdS_stage,
241	            major_mode_size=math.gcd(self.tile_n // wg_n_SdP, self.tile_n // wg_n_dKV),
242	        )
243	        self.sdQaccum_layout = cute.make_layout(
244	            (self.tile_m * self.tile_hdim // self.num_wg_dQ, self.num_wg_dQ)
245	        )
246	        # dQaccum R->S
247	        self.r2s_tiled_copy_dQaccum = cute.make_tiled_copy_tv(
248	            cute.make_copy_atom(cute.nvgpu.CopyUniversalOp(), Float32, num_bits_per_copy=128),
249	            # thr_layout
250	            cute.make_layout((self.num_threads_per_warp_group, self.num_wg_dQ)),
251	            cute.make_layout(128 // Float32.width),  # val_layout
252	        )
253	        # dKVaccum for GQA epilogue - reuses sV+sK memory recast as f32
254	        # TODO: assert that sVaccum and sKaccum don't overflow smem
255	
256	    def _get_tiled_mma(self):
257	        maybe_swap_mn = lambda shape, swap: (shape[1], shape[0], *shape[2:]) if swap else shape
258	        # S = Q @ K.T, dP = dO @ V.T
259	        atom_layout_SdP = (self.AtomLayoutMSdP, self.num_wg_mma // self.AtomLayoutMSdP, 1)
260	        tiler_mn_SdP = (self.tile_m // atom_layout_SdP[0], self.tile_n // atom_layout_SdP[1])
261	        tiled_mma_SdP = sm90_utils_basic.make_trivial_tiled_mma(
262	            self.dtype,
263	            self.dtype,
264	            warpgroup.OperandMajorMode.K,
265	            warpgroup.OperandMajorMode.K,
266	            Float32,
267	            atom_layout_mnk=maybe_swap_mn(atom_layout_SdP, self.SdP_swapAB),
268	            tiler_mn=(64, tiler_mn_SdP[1] if not self.SdP_swapAB else tiler_mn_SdP[0]),
269	        )
270	        # dV = P.T @ dO, dK = dS.T @ Q
271	        atom_layout_dKV = (self.AtomLayoutNdKV, self.num_wg_mma // self.AtomLayoutNdKV, 1)
272	        tiler_mn_dK = (self.tile_n // atom_layout_dKV[0], self.tile_hdim // atom_layout_dKV[1])
273	        tiler_mn_dV = (self.tile_n // atom_layout_dKV[0], self.tile_hdimv // atom_layout_dKV[1])
274	        tiled_mma_dK, tiled_mma_dV = [
275	            sm90_utils_basic.make_trivial_tiled_mma(
276	                self.dtype,
277	                self.dtype,
278	                warpgroup.OperandMajorMode.MN
279	                if not self.mma_dkv_is_rs
280	                else warpgroup.OperandMajorMode.K,
281	                warpgroup.OperandMajorMode.MN,
282	                Float32,
283	                atom_layout_mnk=maybe_swap_mn(atom_layout_dKV, self.dKV_swapAB),
284	                tiler_mn=(64, tiler_mn_d[1] if not self.dKV_swapAB else tiler_mn_d[0]),
285	                a_source=warpgroup.OperandSource.RMEM
286	                if self.mma_dkv_is_rs
287	                else warpgroup.OperandSource.SMEM,
288	            )
289	            for tiler_mn_d in (tiler_mn_dK, tiler_mn_dV)
290	        ]
291	        # dQ = dS @ K
292	        assert self.num_wg_dQ % self.AtomLayoutMdQ == 0
293	        atom_layout_dQ = (self.AtomLayoutMdQ, self.num_wg_dQ // self.AtomLayoutMdQ, 1)
294	        tiler_mn_dQ = (self.tile_m // atom_layout_dQ[0], self.tile_hdim // atom_layout_dQ[1])
295	        tiled_mma_dQ = sm90_utils_basic.make_trivial_tiled_mma(
296	            self.dtype,
297	            self.dtype,
298	            warpgroup.OperandMajorMode.K if not self.dQ_swapAB else warpgroup.OperandMajorMode.MN,
299	            warpgroup.OperandMajorMode.MN if not self.dQ_swapAB else warpgroup.OperandMajorMode.K,
300	            Float32,
301	            atom_layout_mnk=maybe_swap_mn(atom_layout_dQ, self.dQ_swapAB),
302	            tiler_mn=(64, tiler_mn_dQ[1] if not self.dQ_swapAB else tiler_mn_dQ[0]),
303	        )
304	        return tiled_mma_SdP, tiled_mma_dK, tiled_mma_dV, tiled_mma_dQ
305	
306	    def _get_shared_storage_cls(self):
307	        sQ_struct, sK_struct, sV_struct, sdO_struct, sdQaccum_struct = [
308	            cute.struct.Align[cute.struct.MemRange[t, cute.cosize(layout)], self.buffer_align_bytes]
309	            for (layout, t) in [
310	                (self.sQ_layout, self.dtype),
311	                (self.sK_layout, self.dtype),
312	                (self.sV_layout, self.dtype),
313	                (self.sdO_layout, self.dtype),
314	                (self.sdQaccum_layout, Float32),
315	            ]
316	        ]
317	
318	        cosize_sdS = cute.cosize(self.sPdS_layout)
319	        cosize_sP = cute.cosize(self.sPdS_layout) if const_expr(not self.mma_dkv_is_rs) else 0
320	        sLSE_struct = cute.struct.Align[
321	            cute.struct.MemRange[Float32, cute.round_up(self.tile_m, 64) * self.Q_stage], 128
322	        ]
323	        sdPsum_struct = cute.struct.Align[
324	            cute.struct.MemRange[Float32, cute.round_up(self.tile_m, 64) * self.dO_stage], 128
325	        ]
326	
327	        @cute.struct
328	        class SharedStorageQKV:
329	            mbar_ptr_Q: cute.struct.MemRange[cutlass.Int64, self.Q_stage * 2]
330	            mbar_ptr_dO: cute.struct.MemRange[cutlass.Int64, self.dO_stage * 2]
331	            sLSE: sLSE_struct
332	            sdPsum: sdPsum_struct
333	            sQ: sQ_struct
334	            sV: sV_struct
335	            sK: sK_struct
336	            sdO: sdO_struct
337	            sP: cute.struct.Align[cute.struct.MemRange[self.dtype, cosize_sP], 1024]
338	            sdS: cute.struct.Align[cute.struct.MemRange[self.dtype, cosize_sdS], 1024]
339	            sdQaccum: sdQaccum_struct
340	
341	        return SharedStorageQKV
342	
343	    @cute.jit
344	    def __call__(
345	        self,
346	        mQ: cute.Tensor,
347	        mK: cute.Tensor,
348	        mV: cute.Tensor,
349	        mdO: cute.Tensor,
350	        mLSE: cute.Tensor,
351	        mdPsum: cute.Tensor,
352	        mdQaccum: cute.Tensor,
353	        mdK: cute.Tensor,
354	        mdV: cute.Tensor,
355	        softmax_scale: Float32,
356	        mCuSeqlensQ: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
357	        mCuSeqlensK: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
358	        mSeqUsedQ: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
359	        mSeqUsedK: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
360	        window_size_left: Int32 | int | None = None,
361	        window_size_right: Int32 | int | None = None,
362	        mdQ_semaphore: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
363	        mdK_semaphore: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
364	        mdV_semaphore: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
365	        aux_data: AuxData = AuxData(),
366	        blocksparse_tensors: Optional[BlockSparseTensors] = None,
367	        # Always keep stream as the last parameter (EnvStream: obtained implicitly via TVM FFI).
368	        stream: cuda.CUstream = None,
369	    ):
370	        # For GQA (qhead_per_kvhead > 1), multiple Q heads accumulate into the same dK/dV,
371	        # so we need the float32 accum path + postprocess.
372	        # For varlen_k with qhead_per_kvhead == 1, we use ragged TMA tensors.
373	        self.varlen_k = mCuSeqlensK is not None or mSeqUsedK is not None
374	
375	        self._check_type(
376	            *(
377	                t.element_type if t is not None else None
378	                for t in (mQ, mK, mV, mdO, mLSE, mdPsum, mdQaccum, mdK, mdV)
379	            )
380	        )
381	
382	        self.is_varlen_q = mCuSeqlensQ is not None or mSeqUsedQ is not None
383	
384	        mQ, mK, mV, mdO, mLSE, mdPsum, mdQaccum, mdK, mdV = [
385	            assume_tensor_aligned(t) for t in (mQ, mK, mV, mdO, mLSE, mdPsum, mdQaccum, mdK, mdV)
386	        ]
387	
388	        # Non-varlen inputs are (b, s, n, h), varlen inputs are (s, n, h).
389	        # We convert both to a seqlen-major view with head-dim second.
390	        # Each tensor may have different rank when Q is padded (seqused_q) but K/V are unpadded (cu_seqlens_k).
391	        def _qkv_transpose(t):
392	            return layout_utils.select(t, [1, 3, 2, 0] if cute.rank(t.shape) == 4 else [0, 2, 1])
393	
394	        mQ, mK, mV, mdO = [_qkv_transpose(t) for t in (mQ, mK, mV, mdO)]
395	        if const_expr(self.qhead_per_kvhead == 1):
396	            mdK, mdV = [_qkv_transpose(t) for t in (mdK, mdV)]
397	        else:
398	            # Accum tensors are (b, n, s*h) for non-varlen and (n, s*h) for varlen.
399	            accum_transpose = [2, 1, 0] if cute.rank(mdK.shape) == 3 else [1, 0]
400	            mdK, mdV = [layout_utils.select(t, accum_transpose) for t in (mdK, mdV)]
401	        # Non-varlen stats are (b, n, s), varlen stats are (n, s).
402	        LSE_dPsum_dQaccum_transpose = [2, 1, 0] if cute.rank(mLSE.shape) == 3 else [1, 0]
403	        mLSE, mdPsum, mdQaccum = [
404	            layout_utils.select(t, LSE_dPsum_dQaccum_transpose) for t in (mLSE, mdPsum, mdQaccum)
405	        ]
406	
407	        tiled_mma_SdP, tiled_mma_dK, tiled_mma_dV, tiled_mma_dQ = self._get_tiled_mma()
408	        # (batch, num_head, num_m_blocks, cluster_size) -> (num_m_blocks, cluster_size, num_head, batch)
409	        if const_expr(self.deterministic):
410	            assert mdQ_semaphore is not None
411	            mdQ_semaphore = layout_utils.select(mdQ_semaphore, mode=[2, 3, 1, 0])
412	        if const_expr(self.deterministic and self.qhead_per_kvhead > 1):
413	            assert mdK_semaphore is not None
414	            assert mdV_semaphore is not None
415	            mdK_semaphore, mdV_semaphore = [
416	                layout_utils.select(t, mode=[2, 3, 1, 0]) for t in (mdK_semaphore, mdV_semaphore)
417	            ]
418	        else:
419	            mdK_semaphore = None
420	            mdV_semaphore = None
421	
422	        self.num_mma_threads = tiled_mma_SdP.size
423	        assert self.num_mma_threads + 128 == self.num_threads
424	
425	        self.num_threads_per_warp_group = 128
426	        self.num_producer_threads = 32
427	
428	        REG_LIMIT = 504 if self.num_wg_mma == 2 else 512
429	        if const_expr(self.num_wg_mma == 2):
430	            if const_expr(self.num_wg_dQ == 1):
431	                self.num_mma_regs_wg0 = 256
432	                self.num_mma_regs_wg1 = 224
433	            else:
434	                self.num_mma_regs_wg0 = 240
435	                self.num_mma_regs_wg1 = 240
436	            self.num_mma_regs = self.num_mma_regs_wg0  # for backward compat
437	            self.num_producer_regs = 24
438	            assert (
439	                self.num_mma_regs_wg0 + self.num_mma_regs_wg1 + self.num_producer_regs <= REG_LIMIT
440	            )
441	        else:  # 3 warp groups
442	            self.num_mma_regs_wg0 = 160
443	            self.num_mma_regs_wg1 = 160
444	            self.num_mma_regs = 160
445	            self.num_producer_regs = 32
446	            assert self.num_mma_regs_wg0 * self.num_wg_mma + self.num_producer_regs <= REG_LIMIT
447	
448	        self._setup_attributes()
449	        SharedStorage = self._get_shared_storage_cls()
450	
451	        self.tma_copy_bytes = {
452	            name: cute.size_in_bytes(mX.element_type, cute.select(layout, mode=[0, 1]))
453	            for name, mX, layout in [
454	                ("Q", mQ, self.sQ_layout),
455	                ("K", mK, self.sK_layout),
456	                ("V", mV, self.sV_layout),
457	                ("dO", mdO, self.sdO_layout),
458	            ]
459	        }
460	        self.tma_copy_bytes["LSE"] = self.tile_m * Float32.width // 8
461	        self.tma_copy_bytes["dPsum"] = self.tile_m * Float32.width // 8
462	        self.tma_copy_bytes["dQ"] = (
463	            self.tile_m * self.tile_hdim * Float32.width // 8 // self.num_wg_dQ
464	        )
465	        self.tma_copy_bytes["dKacc"] = self.tile_n * self.tile_hdim * Float32.width // 8
466	        self.tma_copy_bytes["dVacc"] = self.tile_n * self.tile_hdimv * Float32.width // 8
467	
468	        tma_atom_Q, tma_tensor_Q = cpasync.make_tiled_tma_atom(
469	            cpasync.CopyBulkTensorTileG2SOp(),
470	            mQ,
471	            cute.select(self.sQ_layout, mode=[0, 1]),
472	            (self.tile_m, self.tile_hdim),
473	        )
474	        tma_atom_K, tma_tensor_K = cpasync.make_tiled_tma_atom(
475	            cpasync.CopyBulkTensorTileG2SOp(),
476	            mK,
477	            cute.select(self.sK_layout, mode=[0, 1]),
478	            (self.tile_n, self.tile_hdim),
479	        )
480	        tma_atom_V, tma_tensor_V = cpasync.make_tiled_tma_atom(
481	            cpasync.CopyBulkTensorTileG2SOp(),
482	            mV,
483	            cute.select(self.sV_layout, mode=[0, 1]),
484	            (self.tile_n, self.tile_hdimv),
485	        )
486	        tma_atom_dO, tma_tensor_dO = cpasync.make_tiled_tma_atom(
487	            cpasync.CopyBulkTensorTileG2SOp(),
488	            mdO,
489	            cute.select(self.sdO_layout, mode=[0, 1]),
490	            (self.tile_m, self.tile_hdimv),
491	        )
492	        if const_expr(self.qhead_per_kvhead == 1):
493	            mdK_tma = (
494	                copy_utils.create_ragged_tensor_for_tma(mdK, ragged_dim=0, ptr_shift=True)
495	                if self.varlen_k
496	                else mdK
497	            )
498	            mdV_tma = (
499	                copy_utils.create_ragged_tensor_for_tma(mdV, ragged_dim=0, ptr_shift=True)
500	                if self.varlen_k
501	                else mdV
502	            )
503	            tma_atom_dK, tma_tensor_dK = cpasync.make_tiled_tma_atom(
504	                cpasync.CopyBulkTensorTileS2GOp(),
505	                mdK_tma,
506	                cute.select(self.sK_layout, mode=[0, 1]),
507	                (self.tile_n, self.tile_hdim),
508	            )
509	            tma_atom_dV, tma_tensor_dV = cpasync.make_tiled_tma_atom(
510	                cpasync.CopyBulkTensorTileS2GOp(),
511	                mdV_tma,
512	                cute.select(self.sV_layout, mode=[0, 1]),
513	                (self.tile_n, self.tile_hdimv),
514	            )
515	        else:
516	            tma_atom_dK = tma_atom_dV = tma_tensor_dK = tma_tensor_dV = None
517	
518	        if const_expr(mCuSeqlensK is not None or mSeqUsedK is not None):
519	            TileScheduler = SingleTileVarlenScheduler
520	        elif const_expr(self.deterministic):
521	            TileScheduler = SingleTileLPTBwdScheduler
522	        else:
523	            TileScheduler = SingleTileScheduler
524	        self.spt = (self.is_causal or self.is_local) and self.deterministic
525	        tile_sched_args = TileSchedulerArguments(
526	            cute.ceil_div(cute.size(mK.shape[0]), self.tile_n),
527	            cute.size(mQ.shape[2]),
528	            cute.size(mK.shape[3])
529	            if const_expr(mCuSeqlensK is None)
530	            else cute.size(mCuSeqlensK.shape[0] - 1),  # num_batch
531	            1,  # num_splits
532	            cute.size(mQ.shape[0]),  # pass seqlen_q or total_q for seqlen_k
533	            mQ.shape[1],  # headdim
534	            mV.shape[1],  # headdim_v
535	            total_q=cute.size(mK.shape[0])
536	            if const_expr(mCuSeqlensK is not None)
537	            else cute.size(mK.shape[0]) * cute.size(mK.shape[3]),
538	            tile_shape_mn=(self.tile_n, self.tile_m),  # Swapping the role of Q & K
539	            mCuSeqlensQ=mCuSeqlensK,
540	            mSeqUsedQ=mSeqUsedK,
541	            qhead_per_kvhead_packgqa=1,
542	            element_size=self.dtype.width // 8,
543	            is_persistent=False,
544	            lpt=self.spt,
545	            head_swizzle=self.deterministic,
546	        )
547	
548	        tile_sched_params = TileScheduler.to_underlying_arguments(tile_sched_args)
549	        grid_dim = TileScheduler.get_grid_shape(tile_sched_params)
550	
551	        LOG2_E = math.log2(math.e)
552	        if const_expr(self.score_mod is None):
553	            softmax_scale_log2 = softmax_scale * LOG2_E
554	        else:
555	            softmax_scale_log2 = LOG2_E
556	
557	        fastdiv_mods = None
558	        if const_expr(aux_data.tensors is not None):
559	            seqlen_q = cute.size(mQ.shape[0])
560	            seqlen_k = cute.size(mK.shape[0])
561	            seqlen_q_divmod = FastDivmodDivisor(seqlen_q)
562	            seqlen_k_divmod = FastDivmodDivisor(seqlen_k)
563	            fastdiv_mods = (seqlen_q_divmod, seqlen_k_divmod)
564	
565	        qhead_per_kvhead_divmod = None
566	        if const_expr(self.qhead_per_kvhead > 1):
567	            qhead_per_kvhead_divmod = FastDivmodDivisor(self.qhead_per_kvhead)
568	
569	        self.use_block_sparsity = cutlass.const_expr(blocksparse_tensors is not None)
570	
571	        if const_expr(window_size_left is not None):
572	            window_size_left = Int32(window_size_left)
573	        if const_expr(window_size_right is not None):
574	            window_size_right = Int32(window_size_right)
575	
576	        self.kernel(
577	            tma_tensor_Q,
578	            tma_tensor_K,
579	            tma_tensor_V,
580	            tma_tensor_dO,
581	            tma_tensor_dK if const_expr(self.qhead_per_kvhead == 1) else mdK,
582	            tma_tensor_dV if const_expr(self.qhead_per_kvhead == 1) else mdV,
583	            tma_atom_Q,
584	            tma_atom_K,
585	            tma_atom_V,
586	            tma_atom_dO,
587	            tma_atom_dK,
588	            tma_atom_dV,
589	            mLSE,
590	            mdPsum,
591	            mdQaccum,
592	            mCuSeqlensQ,
593	            mCuSeqlensK,
594	            mSeqUsedQ,
595	            mSeqUsedK,
596	            self.sQ_layout,
597	            self.sK_layout,
598	            self.sV_layout,
599	            self.sPdS_layout,
600	            self.sdO_layout,
601	            self.sdQaccum_layout,
602	            self.r2s_tiled_copy_dQaccum,
603	            tiled_mma_SdP,
604	            tiled_mma_dK,
605	            tiled_mma_dV,
606	            tiled_mma_dQ,
607	            softmax_scale_log2,
608	            softmax_scale,
609	            tile_sched_params,
610	            TileScheduler,
611	            SharedStorage,
612	            aux_data,
613	            fastdiv_mods,
614	            blocksparse_tensors,
615	            qhead_per_kvhead_divmod,
616	            mdQ_semaphore,
617	            mdK_semaphore,
618	            mdV_semaphore,
619	            window_size_left,
620	            window_size_right,
621	        ).launch(
622	            grid=grid_dim,
623	            block=[self.num_threads, 1, 1],
624	            stream=stream,
625	            min_blocks_per_mp=1,
626	            use_pdl=True,
627	        )

629	    @cute.kernel
630	    def kernel(
631	        self,
632	        mQ: cute.Tensor,
633	        mK: cute.Tensor,
634	        mV: cute.Tensor,
635	        mdO: cute.Tensor,
636	        mdK: cute.Tensor,
637	        mdV: cute.Tensor,
638	        tma_atom_Q: cute.CopyAtom,
639	        tma_atom_K: cute.CopyAtom,
640	        tma_atom_V: cute.CopyAtom,
641	        tma_atom_dO: cute.CopyAtom,
642	        tma_atom_dK: cute.CopyAtom,
643	        tma_atom_dV: cute.CopyAtom,
644	        mLSE: cute.Tensor,
645	        mdPsum: cute.Tensor,
646	        mdQaccum: cute.Tensor,
647	        mCuSeqlensQ: Optional[cute.Tensor],
648	        mCuSeqlensK: Optional[cute.Tensor],
649	        mSeqUsedQ: Optional[cute.Tensor],
650	        mSeqUsedK: Optional[cute.Tensor],
651	        sQ_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
652	        sK_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
653	        sV_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
654	        sPdS_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
655	        sdO_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
656	        sdQaccum_layout: cute.Layout,
657	        r2s_tiled_copy_dQaccum: cute.TiledCopy,
658	        tiled_mma_SdP: cute.TiledMma,
659	        tiled_mma_dK: cute.TiledMma,
660	        tiled_mma_dV: cute.TiledMma,
661	        tiled_mma_dQ: cute.TiledMma,
662	        softmax_scale_log2,
663	        softmax_scale,
664	        tile_sched_params: ParamsBase,
665	        TileScheduler: cutlass.Constexpr[Callable],
666	        SharedStorage: cutlass.Constexpr[Callable],
667	        aux_data: AuxData = AuxData(),
668	        fastdiv_mods=(None, None),
669	        blocksparse_tensors: Optional[BlockSparseTensors] = None,
670	        qhead_per_kvhead_divmod: Optional[FastDivmodDivisor] = None,
671	        mdQ_semaphore: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
672	        mdK_semaphore: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
673	        mdV_semaphore: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
674	        window_size_left: Optional[Int32] = None,
675	        window_size_right: Optional[Int32] = None,
676	    ):
677	        warp_idx = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx())
678	
679	        # prefetch TMA descriptors
680	        if warp_idx == 0:
681	            for atom in [tma_atom_Q, tma_atom_K, tma_atom_V, tma_atom_dO, tma_atom_dK, tma_atom_dV]:
682	                if const_expr(atom is not None):
683	                    cpasync.prefetch_descriptor(atom)
684	
685	        smem = cutlass.utils.SmemAllocator()
686	        storage = smem.allocate(SharedStorage)
687	
688	        pipeline_producer_group = cutlass.pipeline.CooperativeGroup(cutlass.pipeline.Agent.Thread)
689	        pipeline_consumer_group = cutlass.pipeline.CooperativeGroup(
690	            cutlass.pipeline.Agent.Thread, self.num_mma_threads // cute.arch.WARP_SIZE
691	        )
692	        pipeline_Q = pipeline.PipelineTmaAsync.create(
693	            barrier_storage=storage.mbar_ptr_Q.data_ptr(),
694	            num_stages=self.Q_stage,
695	            producer_group=pipeline_producer_group,
696	            consumer_group=pipeline_consumer_group,
697	            tx_count=self.tma_copy_bytes["Q"] + self.tma_copy_bytes["LSE"],
698	            defer_sync=True,
699	        )
700	        pipeline_dO = pipeline.PipelineTmaAsync.create(
701	            barrier_storage=storage.mbar_ptr_dO.data_ptr(),
702	            num_stages=self.dO_stage,
703	            producer_group=pipeline_producer_group,
704	            consumer_group=pipeline_consumer_group,
705	            tx_count=self.tma_copy_bytes["dO"] + self.tma_copy_bytes["dPsum"],
706	            defer_sync=False,
707	        )
708	
709	        sQ = storage.sQ.get_tensor(sQ_layout.outer, swizzle=sQ_layout.inner)
710	        sdO = storage.sdO.get_tensor(sdO_layout.outer, swizzle=sdO_layout.inner)
711	        sK = storage.sK.get_tensor(sK_layout.outer, swizzle=sK_layout.inner)
712	        sV = storage.sV.get_tensor(sV_layout.outer, swizzle=sV_layout.inner)
713	        sP = None
714	        if const_expr(not self.mma_dkv_is_rs):
715	            sP = storage.sP.get_tensor(sPdS_layout.outer, swizzle=sPdS_layout.inner)
716	        sdS = storage.sdS.get_tensor(sPdS_layout.outer, swizzle=sPdS_layout.inner)
717	        sLSE = storage.sLSE.get_tensor(
718	            cute.make_layout(
719	                (self.tile_m, self.Q_stage),
720	                stride=(1, cute.round_up(self.tile_m, 64)),
721	            )
722	        )
723	        sdPsum = storage.sdPsum.get_tensor(
724	            cute.make_layout(
725	                (self.tile_m, self.dO_stage),
726	                stride=(1, cute.round_up(self.tile_m, 64)),
727	            )
728	        )
729	        sdQaccum = storage.sdQaccum.get_tensor(sdQaccum_layout)
730	
731	        block_info = BlockInfo(
732	            self.tile_m,
733	            self.tile_n,
734	            self.is_causal,
735	            self.is_local,
736	            False,  # is_split_kv
737	            window_size_left,
738	            window_size_right,
739	            qhead_per_kvhead_packgqa=1,
740	        )
741	        SeqlenInfoCls = partial(
742	            SeqlenInfoQK.create,
743	            seqlen_q_static=mQ.shape[0],
744	            seqlen_k_static=mK.shape[0],
745	            mCuSeqlensQ=mCuSeqlensQ,
746	            mCuSeqlensK=mCuSeqlensK,
747	            mSeqUsedQ=mSeqUsedQ,
748	            mSeqUsedK=mSeqUsedK,
749	            tile_m=self.tile_m,
750	            tile_n=self.tile_n,
751	        )
752	        AttentionMaskCls = partial(
753	            AttentionMask,
754	            self.tile_m,
755	            self.tile_n,
756	            window_size_left=window_size_left,
757	            window_size_right=window_size_right,
758	            swap_AB=self.SdP_swapAB,
759	        )
760	        TileSchedulerCls = partial(TileScheduler.create, tile_sched_params)
761	
762	        if warp_idx < 4:
763	            cute.arch.setmaxregister_decrease(self.num_producer_regs)
764	            if warp_idx == 0:
765	                self.load(
766	                    mQ,
767	                    mK,
768	                    mV,
769	                    mdO,
770	                    mLSE,
771	                    mdPsum,
772	                    sQ,
773	                    sK,
774	                    sV,
775	                    sdO,
776	                    sLSE,
777	                    sdPsum,
778	                    tma_atom_Q,
779	                    tma_atom_K,
780	                    tma_atom_V,
781	                    tma_atom_dO,
782	                    pipeline_Q,
783	                    pipeline_dO,
784	                    block_info,
785	                    SeqlenInfoCls,
786	                    TileSchedulerCls,
787	                    blocksparse_tensors,
788	                    qhead_per_kvhead_divmod,
789	                )
790	            if warp_idx == 1:
791	                self.dQaccum_store(
792	                    mdQaccum,
793	                    sdQaccum,
794	                    block_info,
795	                    TileSchedulerCls,
796	                    SeqlenInfoCls,
797	                    blocksparse_tensors,
798	                    mdQ_semaphore,
799	                )
800	        else:
801	            tidx, _, _ = cute.arch.thread_idx()
802	            tidx = tidx - 128
803	            mma_args = (
804	                tiled_mma_SdP,
805	                tiled_mma_dK,
806	                tiled_mma_dV,
807	                tiled_mma_dQ,
808	                mdK,
809	                mdV,
810	                mdK_semaphore,
811	                mdV_semaphore,
812	                mdQaccum,
813	                sQ,
814	                sK,
815	                sV,
816	                sdO,
817	                sP,
818	                sdS,
819	                sLSE,
820	                sdPsum,
821	                sdQaccum,
822	                pipeline_Q,
823	                pipeline_dO,
824	                tidx,
825	                tma_atom_dK,
826	                tma_atom_dV,
827	                r2s_tiled_copy_dQaccum,
828	                softmax_scale_log2,
829	                softmax_scale,
830	                block_info,
831	                SeqlenInfoCls,
832	                AttentionMaskCls,
833	                TileSchedulerCls,
834	                aux_data,
835	                fastdiv_mods,
836	                blocksparse_tensors,
837	                qhead_per_kvhead_divmod,
838	            )
839	            if const_expr(self.num_wg_dQ == self.num_wg_mma):
840	                # Both WGs compute dQ
841	                cute.arch.setmaxregister_increase(self.num_mma_regs_wg0)
842	                self.mma(*mma_args, is_dQ_wg=True)
843	            else:
844	                # WG0 computes dQ, WG1 skips it
845	                warp_idx_in_mma = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx()) - 4
846	                if warp_idx_in_mma < 4:
847	                    cute.arch.setmaxregister_increase(self.num_mma_regs_wg0)
848	                    self.mma(*mma_args, is_dQ_wg=True)
849	                else:
850	                    cute.arch.setmaxregister_increase(self.num_mma_regs_wg1)
851	                    self.mma(*mma_args, is_dQ_wg=False)

853	    @cute.jit
854	    def load(
855	        self,
856	        mQ: cute.Tensor,
857	        mK: cute.Tensor,
858	        mV: cute.Tensor,
859	        mdO: cute.Tensor,
860	        mLSE: cute.Tensor,
861	        mdPsum: cute.Tensor,
862	        sQ: cute.Tensor,
863	        sK: cute.Tensor,
864	        sV: cute.Tensor,
865	        sdO: cute.Tensor,
866	        sLSE: cute.Tensor,
867	        sdPsum: cute.Tensor,
868	        tma_atom_Q: cute.CopyAtom,
869	        tma_atom_K: cute.CopyAtom,
870	        tma_atom_V: cute.CopyAtom,
871	        tma_atom_dO: cute.CopyAtom,
872	        pipeline_Q: cutlass.pipeline.PipelineAsync,
873	        pipeline_dO: cutlass.pipeline.PipelineAsync,
874	        block_info: BlockInfo,
875	        SeqlenInfoCls: Callable,
876	        TileSchedulerCls: Callable,
877	        blocksparse_tensors: Optional[BlockSparseTensors] = None,
878	        qhead_per_kvhead_divmod: Optional[FastDivmodDivisor] = None,
879	    ):
880	        warp_idx_in_wg = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx()) % 4
881	
882	        if warp_idx_in_wg == 0:
883	            producer_state_Q = cutlass.pipeline.make_pipeline_state(
884	                cutlass.pipeline.PipelineUserType.Producer, self.Q_stage
885	            )
886	            producer_state_dO = cutlass.pipeline.make_pipeline_state(
887	                cutlass.pipeline.PipelineUserType.Producer, self.dO_stage
888	            )
889	            tile_scheduler = TileSchedulerCls()
890	            work_tile = tile_scheduler.initial_work_tile_info()
891	            while work_tile.is_valid_tile:
892	                n_block, head_idx, batch_idx, _ = work_tile.tile_idx
893	                seqlen = SeqlenInfoCls(batch_idx)
894	                head_idx_kv = (
895	                    head_idx
896	                    if const_expr(self.qhead_per_kvhead == 1)
897	                    else head_idx // qhead_per_kvhead_divmod
898	                )
899	                mK_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_K(mK, batch_idx, dim=3)[None, None, head_idx_kv]
900	                mV_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_K(mV, batch_idx, dim=3)[None, None, head_idx_kv]
901	                gK = cute.local_tile(mK_cur, (self.tile_n, self.tile_hdim), (n_block, 0))
902	                gV = cute.local_tile(mV_cur, (self.tile_n, self.tile_hdimv), (n_block, 0))
903	
904	                mQ_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_Q(mQ, batch_idx, dim=3)[None, None, head_idx]
905	                mLSE_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_Q(mLSE, batch_idx, dim=2, padded=True)[
906	                    None, head_idx
907	                ]
908	                mdO_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_Q(mdO, batch_idx, dim=3)[None, None, head_idx]
909	                mdPsum_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_Q(mdPsum, batch_idx, dim=2, padded=True)[
910	                    None, head_idx
911	                ]
912	                gQ = cute.local_tile(mQ_cur, (self.tile_m, self.tile_hdim), (None, 0))
913	                gdO = cute.local_tile(mdO_cur, (self.tile_m, self.tile_hdimv), (None, 0))
914	                gLSE = cute.local_tile(mLSE_cur, (self.tile_m,), (None,))
915	                gdPsum = cute.local_tile(mdPsum_cur, (self.tile_m,), (None,))
916	
917	                load_K, _, _ = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
918	                    tma_atom_K, 0, cute.make_layout(1), gK, sK, single_stage=True
919	                )
920	                load_V, _, _ = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
921	                    tma_atom_V, 0, cute.make_layout(1), gV, sV, single_stage=True
922	                )
923	                load_Q, _, _ = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
924	                    tma_atom_Q, 0, cute.make_layout(1), gQ, sQ
925	                )
926	                load_Q = copy_utils.tma_producer_copy_fn(load_Q, pipeline_Q)
927	                load_dO, _, _ = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
928	                    tma_atom_dO, 0, cute.make_layout(1), gdO, sdO
929	                )
930	                load_dO = copy_utils.tma_producer_copy_fn(load_dO, pipeline_dO)
931	                load_LSE = copy_utils.cpasync_bulk_get_copy_fn(gLSE, sLSE)
932	                load_LSE = copy_utils.tma_producer_copy_fn(load_LSE, pipeline_Q)
933	                load_dPsum = copy_utils.cpasync_bulk_get_copy_fn(gdPsum, sdPsum)

936	                m_block_min, m_block_max = block_info.get_m_block_min_max(seqlen, n_block)
937	
938	                if const_expr(not self.use_block_sparsity):
939	                    total_m_block_cnt = m_block_max - m_block_min
940	                    process_tile = (
941	                        const_expr(not self.is_local and not self.is_varlen_q)
942	                        or m_block_min < m_block_max
943	                    )
944	                else:
945	                    total_m_block_cnt = get_total_q_block_count_bwd(
946	                        blocksparse_tensors,
947	                        batch_idx,
948	                        head_idx,
949	                        n_block,
950	                        q_subtile_factor=self.q_subtile_factor,
951	                        m_block_max=m_block_max,
952	                    )
953	                    process_tile = total_m_block_cnt > Int32(0)
954	
955	                if process_tile:
956	                    if const_expr(not self.use_block_sparsity):
957	                        first_m_block = m_block_min
958	                        pipeline_Q.producer_acquire(
959	                            producer_state_Q, extra_tx_count=self.tma_copy_bytes["K"]
960	                        )
961	                        load_K(tma_bar_ptr=pipeline_Q.producer_get_barrier(producer_state_Q))
962	                        load_Q(first_m_block, producer_state=producer_state_Q)
963	                        # Wait for bwd preprocess to finish writing LSE and dPsum
964	                        cute.arch.griddepcontrol_wait()
965	                        load_LSE(first_m_block, producer_state=producer_state_Q)
966	                        producer_state_dO_cur = (
967	                            producer_state_dO
968	                            if const_expr(self.Q_stage != self.dO_stage)
969	                            else producer_state_Q
970	                        )
971	                        pipeline_dO.producer_acquire(
972	                            producer_state_dO_cur, extra_tx_count=self.tma_copy_bytes["V"]
973	                        )
974	                        load_V(tma_bar_ptr=pipeline_dO.producer_get_barrier(producer_state_dO_cur))
975	                        load_dO(first_m_block, producer_state=producer_state_dO_cur)
976	                        load_dPsum(first_m_block, producer_state=producer_state_dO_cur)
977	                        producer_state_Q.advance()
978	                        producer_state_dO.advance()
979	
980	                        for m_block in cutlass.range(m_block_min + 1, m_block_max, unroll=1):
981	                            pipeline_Q.producer_acquire(producer_state_Q)
982	                            load_Q(m_block, producer_state=producer_state_Q)
983	                            load_LSE(m_block, producer_state=producer_state_Q)
984	                            producer_state_dO_cur = (

986	                                if const_expr(self.Q_stage != self.dO_stage)
987	                                else producer_state_Q
988	                            )
989	                            pipeline_dO.producer_acquire(producer_state_dO_cur)
990	                            load_dO(m_block, producer_state=producer_state_dO_cur)
991	                            load_dPsum(m_block, producer_state=producer_state_dO_cur)
992	                            producer_state_Q.advance()
993	                            producer_state_dO.advance()
994	                    else:
995	                        producer_state_Q, producer_state_dO = produce_block_sparse_q_loads_bwd_sm90(
996	                            blocksparse_tensors,
997	                            batch_idx,
998	                            head_idx,
999	                            n_block,
1000	                            producer_state_Q,
1001	                            producer_state_dO,
1002	                            pipeline_Q,
1003	                            pipeline_dO,
1004	                            load_K,
1005	                            load_V,
1006	                            load_Q,
1007	                            load_dO,
1008	                            load_LSE,
1009	                            load_dPsum,
1010	                            self.tma_copy_bytes["K"],
1011	                            self.tma_copy_bytes["V"],
1012	                            Q_stage_eq_dO_stage=(self.Q_stage == self.dO_stage),
1013	                            q_subtile_factor=self.q_subtile_factor,
1014	                            m_block_max=m_block_max,
1015	                        )
1016	
1017	                tile_scheduler.prefetch_next_work()

1019	                work_tile = tile_scheduler.get_current_work()

1021	    @cute.jit
1022	    def apply_score_mod(
1023	        self,
1024	        acc_S: cute.Tensor,
1025	        thr_mma_SdP: cute.ThrMma,
1026	        batch_idx,
1027	        head_idx,
1028	        m_block,
1029	        n_block,
1030	        softmax_scale,
1031	        seqlen_info: SeqlenInfoQK,
1032	        aux_data: AuxData = AuxData(),
1033	        fastdiv_mods=(None, None),
1034	    ):
1035	        # [NOTE] SdP_swapAB: swapAB transposes the tile, so use (n, m) indexing
1036	        cS = cute.make_identity_tensor(
1037	            (self.tile_n, self.tile_m) if self.SdP_swapAB else (self.tile_m, self.tile_n)
1038	        )
1039	        cS = cute.domain_offset(
1040	            (n_block * self.tile_n, m_block * self.tile_m)
1041	            if self.SdP_swapAB
1042	            else (m_block * self.tile_m, n_block * self.tile_n),
1043	            cS,
1044	        )
1045	        tScS = thr_mma_SdP.partition_C(cS)
1046	
1047	        apply_score_mod_inner(
1048	            acc_S,
1049	            tScS,
1050	            self.score_mod,
1051	            batch_idx,
1052	            head_idx,
1053	            softmax_scale,
1054	            self.vec_size,
1055	            self.qk_acc_dtype,
1056	            aux_data,
1057	            fastdiv_mods,
1058	            seqlen_info,
1059	            constant_q_idx=None,
1060	            qhead_per_kvhead=self.qhead_per_kvhead,
1061	            transpose_indices=self.SdP_swapAB,
1062	        )
1063

1081	        )

1084	            if self.SdP_swapAB

1087	        )

1089	
1090	        apply_score_mod_bwd_inner(
1091	            grad_tensor,
1092	            score_tensor,
1093	            tScS,
1094	            self.score_mod_bwd,

1096	            head_idx,
1097	            softmax_scale,
1098	            self.vec_size,
1099	            self.qk_acc_dtype,
1100	            aux_data,
1101	            fastdiv_mods,
1102	            seqlen_info,
1103	            constant_q_idx=None,
1104	            qhead_per_kvhead=self.qhead_per_kvhead,
1105	            transpose_indices=self.SdP_swapAB,
1106	        )

1389	                        score_mod_bwd_fn=score_mod_bwd_fn_cur,
1390	                        q_subtile_factor=self.q_subtile_factor,
1391	                        m_block_max=m_block_max,

1409	                    tiled_mma_dV,

1451	    @staticmethod
1452	    @cute.jit
1453	    def _get_stat(tSrS: cute.Tensor, row: Int32, lane: Int32, shuffle: bool) -> Float32:
1454	        """Retrieve the statistic for a given accumulator row.
1455	
1456	        When shuffle=False, direct register indexing.
1457	        When shuffle=True, warp shuffle from the thread group that holds the value.
1458	        """
1459	        if const_expr(not shuffle):
1460	            return tSrS[row]
1461	        # tSrS: (((2, 1), 1), 1)), distributed across 8 threads in the warp
1462	        vecsize = cute.size(tSrS, mode=[0, 0])  # 2
1463	        idx0, off, idx1 = cute.idx2crd(row, (vecsize, 8, cute.shape(tSrS, mode=[0, 1])))
1464	        # register index: 0, 1, 0, 1, ..., 2, 3, 2, 3, ...
1465	        return utils.shuffle_sync(tSrS[idx0 + idx1 * vecsize], offset=off * 4 + (lane % 4))

1467	    @cute.jit
1468	    def mma_one_m_block(
1469	        self,
1470	        m_block: Int32,
1471	        consumer_state_Q: cutlass.pipeline.PipelineState | pipeline.PipelineStateSimple,
1472	        consumer_state_dO: cutlass.pipeline.PipelineState | pipeline.PipelineStateSimple,
1473	        warp_group_idx: Int32,
1474	        mma_qk_fn: Callable,
1475	        mma_dov_fn: Callable,
1476	        mma_pdo_fn: Callable,
1477	        mma_dsq_fn: Callable,
1478	        mma_dsk_fn: Callable,
1479	        copy_P_r2s: Optional[Callable],
1480	        copy_dS_r2s: Callable,
1481	        pipeline_Q: cutlass.pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1482	        pipeline_dO: cutlass.pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1483	        tLSEsLSE: cute.Tensor,
1484	        tLSEsdPsum: cute.Tensor,
1485	        tdQsdQaccum: Optional[cute.Tensor],
1486	        softmax_scale_log2: Float32,
1487	        PdS_barrier: cutlass.pipeline.NamedBarrier,
1488	        is_dQ_wg: cutlass.Constexpr[bool] = True,
1489	        mask_fn: Optional[Callable] = None,
1490	        score_mod_fn: Optional[Callable] = None,
1491	        score_mod_bwd_fn: Optional[Callable] = None,
1492	        dKV_accumulate: Boolean = True,
1493	    ):
1494	        consumer_state_dO_cur = (
1495	            consumer_state_Q if const_expr(self.Q_stage == self.dO_stage) else consumer_state_dO
1496	        )
1497	        smem_idx_Q = consumer_state_Q.index
1498	        smem_idx_dO = consumer_state_dO_cur.index if const_expr(self.dO_stage > 1) else 0
1499	        smem_idx_PdS = smem_idx_Q if const_expr(self.PdS_stage > 1) else 0
1500	        # (1) [GEMM 1] S = Q @ K^T
1501	        pipeline_Q.consumer_wait(consumer_state_Q, pipeline_Q.consumer_try_wait(consumer_state_Q))
1502	        acc_S = mma_qk_fn(A_idx=smem_idx_Q, wg_wait=-1)
1503	        # If shuffle_LSE, OOB reads are OK since sLSE is already padded
1504	        tLSErLSE = copy_utils.load_s2r(tLSEsLSE[None, smem_idx_Q])
1505	        # (2) [GEMM 2] dP = dO @ V.T
1506	        pipeline_dO.consumer_wait(
1507	            consumer_state_dO_cur, pipeline_dO.consumer_try_wait(consumer_state_dO_cur)
1508	        )
1509	        acc_dP = mma_dov_fn(A_idx=smem_idx_Q, wg_wait=1)
1510	
1511	        if const_expr(self.score_mod_bwd is not None):
1512	            acc_S_pre = cute.make_fragment_like(acc_S)
1513	            cute.autovec_copy(acc_S, acc_S_pre)
1514	
1515	        if const_expr(self.score_mod is not None):
1516	            score_mod_fn(acc_S, m_block=m_block)
1517	
1518	        # (3) [Pointwise 1] P = exp(S - LSE)
1519	        if cutlass.const_expr(mask_fn is not None):
1520	            mask_fn(acc_S, m_block=m_block)
1521	        acc_S_mn = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_mn(acc_S, transpose=self.SdP_swapAB)
1522	        lane_idx = cute.arch.lane_idx()
1523	        for r in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(acc_S_mn, mode=[0])):
1524	            lse_val = self._get_stat(tLSErLSE, r, lane_idx, shuffle=self.shuffle_LSE)
1525	            for c in cutlass.range(cute.size(acc_S_mn, mode=[1]), unroll_full=True):
1526	                acc_S_mn[r, c] = cute.math.exp2(
1527	                    acc_S_mn[r, c] * softmax_scale_log2 - lse_val, fastmath=True
1528	                )
1529	        tLSErdPsum = copy_utils.load_s2r(tLSEsdPsum[None, smem_idx_dO])
1530	
1531	        # Convert P from f32 -> f16
1532	        tdVrP = utils.cvt_f16(layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_frgA(acc_S), self.dtype)
1533	        # R2S for P
1534	        if const_expr(not self.mma_dkv_is_rs):
1535	            # sync to ensure P has already been used in the previous iteration before overwriting
1536	            if const_expr(self.PdS_stage == 1):
1537	                PdS_barrier.arrive_and_wait()
1538	            copy_P_r2s(tdVrP, dst_idx=smem_idx_PdS)
1539	
1540	        # (4) [Pointwise 2] dS = P*(dP-dPsum)
1541	        warpgroup.wait_group(0)
1542	        acc_dP_mn = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_mn(acc_dP, transpose=self.SdP_swapAB)
1543	        for r in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(acc_dP_mn, mode=[0])):
1544	            dpsum_val = self._get_stat(tLSErdPsum, r, lane_idx, shuffle=self.shuffle_dPsum)
1545	            for c in cutlass.range(cute.size(acc_dP_mn, mode=[1]), unroll_full=True):
1546	                acc_dP_mn[r, c] = acc_S_mn[r, c] * (acc_dP_mn[r, c] - dpsum_val)
1547	
1548	        if const_expr(self.score_mod_bwd is not None):
1549	            score_mod_bwd_fn(acc_dP, acc_S_pre, m_block=m_block)
1550	
1551	        # Convert dS from f32 -> f16
1552	        tdKrdS = utils.cvt_f16(layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_frgA(acc_dP), self.dtype)
1553	
1554	        # If there's double buffering on dS, we don't need to sync here.
1555	        # Otherwise we might have WG1 writing to dS before WG2 is done reading from it during MmadQ.
1556	        # But because both WGs have to sync at the end of the loop and double buffering,
1557	        # this race condition is not possible.
1558	        # This sync is to ensure (1) P is written in case of !mma_dkv_is_rs and
1559	        # (2) dS is already read by the Mma in the previous iteration in case of mma_dkv_is_rs.
1560	        if const_expr(not self.mma_dkv_is_rs or (self.PdS_stage == 1 and self.mma_dkv_is_rs)):
1561	            cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
1562	            PdS_barrier.arrive_and_wait()
1563	
1564	        # R2S for dS
1565	        copy_dS_r2s(tdKrdS, dst_idx=smem_idx_PdS)
1566	
1567	        # (5) [GEMM 3] dV += P.T @ dO
1568	        if const_expr(not self.mma_dkv_is_rs):
1569	            mma_pdo_fn(
1570	                A_idx=smem_idx_PdS, B_idx=smem_idx_dO, zero_init=not dKV_accumulate, wg_wait=-1
1571	            )
1572	        else:
1573	            mma_pdo_fn(tCrA=tdVrP, B_idx=smem_idx_dO, zero_init=not dKV_accumulate, wg_wait=-1)
1574	
1575	        # smem fence to make sure sdS is written before it's read by WGMMA
1576	        cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
1577	        PdS_barrier.arrive_and_wait()
1578	
1579	        if const_expr(is_dQ_wg):
1580	            # (6) [GEMM 4] dQ = dS @ K
1581	            acc_dQ = mma_dsk_fn(A_idx=smem_idx_PdS, wg_wait=1)
1582	            pipeline_dO.consumer_release(consumer_state_dO_cur)  # release dO as dV mma is done
1583	
1584	            # (7) [GEMM 5] dK += dS.T @ Q
1585	            if const_expr(not self.mma_dkv_is_rs):
1586	                mma_dsq_fn(
1587	                    A_idx=smem_idx_PdS, B_idx=smem_idx_Q, zero_init=not dKV_accumulate, wg_wait=1
1588	                )
1589	            else:
1590	                mma_dsq_fn(tCrA=tdKrdS, B_idx=smem_idx_Q, zero_init=not dKV_accumulate, wg_wait=1)
1591	
1592	            # dQ R2S: wait for dQaccum_store to free the smem buffer, then write dQ to smem
1593	            # When dQ_single_wg, only WG0 enters here so warp_group_idx == 0
1594	            cute.arch.barrier(
1595	                barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.dQEmptyWG0) + warp_group_idx,
1596	                number_of_threads=self.num_threads_per_warp_group + cute.arch.WARP_SIZE,
1597	            )
1598	            tdQrdQaccum_flat = cute.make_tensor(
1599	                acc_dQ.iterator, cute.make_layout(tdQsdQaccum.shape)
1600	            )
1601	            cute.autovec_copy(tdQrdQaccum_flat, tdQsdQaccum)
1602	            cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
1603	            cute.arch.barrier_arrive(
1604	                barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.dQFullWG0) + warp_group_idx,
1605	                number_of_threads=self.num_threads_per_warp_group + cute.arch.WARP_SIZE,
1606	            )
1607	
1608	            warpgroup.wait_group(0)
1609	            pipeline_Q.consumer_release(consumer_state_Q)
1610	        else:
1611	            # dQ_single_wg: WG1 skips dQ, only does dV wait + dK
1612	            # (7) [GEMM 5] dK += dS.T @ Q
1613	            if const_expr(not self.mma_dkv_is_rs):
1614	                mma_dsq_fn(
1615	                    A_idx=smem_idx_PdS, B_idx=smem_idx_Q, zero_init=not dKV_accumulate, wg_wait=1
1616	                )
1617	            else:
1618	                mma_dsq_fn(tCrA=tdKrdS, B_idx=smem_idx_Q, zero_init=not dKV_accumulate, wg_wait=1)
1619	            pipeline_dO.consumer_release(consumer_state_dO_cur)
1620	            warpgroup.wait_group(0)
1621	            pipeline_Q.consumer_release(consumer_state_Q)
1622	
1623	        consumer_state_Q.advance()
1624	        consumer_state_dO.advance()
1625	        return consumer_state_Q, consumer_state_dO

1627	    @cute.jit
1628	    def epilogue_dKV(
1629	        self,
1630	        acc_dV: cute.Tensor,
1631	        mdV: cute.Tensor,
1632	        sV: cute.Tensor,
1633	        acc_dK: cute.Tensor,
1634	        mdK: cute.Tensor,
1635	        sK: cute.Tensor,
1636	        seqlen: SeqlenInfoQK,
1637	        tma_atom_dK: cute.CopyAtom,
1638	        tma_atom_dV: cute.CopyAtom,
1639	        tiled_mma_dK: cute.TiledMma,
1640	        tiled_mma_dV: cute.TiledMma,
1641	        tidx: Int32,
1642	        n_block: Int32,
1643	        head_idx: Int32,
1644	        batch_idx: Int32,
1645	        qhead_per_kvhead_divmod: Optional[FastDivmodDivisor] = None,
1646	        mdK_semaphore: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
1647	        mdV_semaphore: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
1648	    ):
1649	        epi_barrier = cutlass.pipeline.NamedBarrier(
1650	            barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.Epilogue), num_threads=self.num_mma_threads
1651	        )
1652	        warp_idx = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx())
1653	
1654	        if const_expr(self.qhead_per_kvhead == 1):
1655	            mdK_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_K(mdK, batch_idx, dim=3, ragged=self.varlen_k)[
1656	                None, None, head_idx
1657	            ]
1658	            mdV_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_K(mdV, batch_idx, dim=3, ragged=self.varlen_k)[
1659	                None, None, head_idx
1660	            ]
1661	            gdK = cute.local_tile(mdK_cur, (self.tile_n, self.tile_hdim), (n_block, 0))
1662	            gdV = cute.local_tile(mdV_cur, (self.tile_n, self.tile_hdimv), (n_block, 0))
1663	            store_dK, _, _ = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
1664	                tma_atom_dK, 0, cute.make_layout(1), sK, gdK, single_stage=True
1665	            )
1666	            store_dV, _, _ = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
1667	                tma_atom_dV, 0, cute.make_layout(1), sV, gdV, single_stage=True
1668	            )
1669	            sdV = sV if const_expr(not self.dKV_swapAB) else layout_utils.transpose_view(sV)
1670	            sdK = sK if const_expr(not self.dKV_swapAB) else layout_utils.transpose_view(sK)
1671	            copy_dV_r2s, _, _ = copy_utils.get_smem_store_C(
1672	                tiled_mma_dV,
1673	                sdV,
1674	                tidx,
1675	                transpose=self.dKV_swapAB,
1676	                position_independent=True,
1677	            )
1678	            copy_dK_r2s, _, _ = copy_utils.get_smem_store_C(
1679	                tiled_mma_dK,
1680	                sdK,
1681	                tidx,
1682	                transpose=self.dKV_swapAB,
1683	                position_independent=True,
1684	            )
1685	            cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_wait_group(1, read=True)
1686	            epi_barrier.arrive_and_wait()
1687	            copy_dV_r2s(acc_dV, dst_idx=None)
1688	            cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
1689	            epi_barrier.arrive_and_wait()
1690	            if warp_idx == 4:
1691	                store_dV()
1692	                cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_commit_group()
1693	            cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_wait_group(1, read=True)
1694	            epi_barrier.arrive_and_wait()
1695	            copy_dK_r2s(acc_dK, dst_idx=None)
1696	            cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
1697	            epi_barrier.arrive_and_wait()
1698	            if warp_idx == 4:
1699	                store_dK()
1700	                cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_commit_group()
1701	        else:
1702	            deterministic_KV = self.deterministic and self.qhead_per_kvhead > 1
1703	            sdKaccum_shape0 = self.tile_n * self.tile_hdim // self.num_wg_mma
1704	            sdVaccum_shape0 = self.tile_n * self.tile_hdimv // self.num_wg_mma
1705	            sdKaccum_layout = cute.make_layout((sdKaccum_shape0, self.num_wg_mma))
1706	            sdVaccum_layout = cute.make_layout((sdVaccum_shape0, self.num_wg_mma))
1707	            head_idx_kv = head_idx // qhead_per_kvhead_divmod
1708	            if const_expr(deterministic_KV):
1709	                assert mdK_semaphore is not None
1710	                assert mdV_semaphore is not None
1711	                mdK_semaphore_cur = mdK_semaphore[n_block, None, head_idx_kv, batch_idx]
1712	                mdV_semaphore_cur = mdV_semaphore[n_block, None, head_idx_kv, batch_idx]
1713	                lock_value = head_idx % self.qhead_per_kvhead
1714	            mdKaccum_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_K(
1715	                mdK, batch_idx, dim=2, padded=True, multiple=self.tile_hdim
1716	            )[None, head_idx_kv]
1717	            mdVaccum_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_K(
1718	                mdV, batch_idx, dim=2, padded=True, multiple=self.tile_hdimv
1719	            )[None, head_idx_kv]
1720	            gdKaccum_ = cute.local_tile(mdKaccum_cur, (self.tile_n * self.tile_hdim,), (n_block,))
1721	            gdKaccum = cute.flat_divide(gdKaccum_, (sdKaccum_shape0,))
1722	            gdVaccum_ = cute.local_tile(mdVaccum_cur, (self.tile_n * self.tile_hdimv,), (n_block,))
1723	            gdVaccum = cute.flat_divide(gdVaccum_, (sdVaccum_shape0,))
1724	            # These two overlap each other
1725	            sVaccum_ptr = cute.recast_ptr(sV.iterator, dtype=Float32)
1726	            sdKaccum = cute.make_tensor(sVaccum_ptr, sdKaccum_layout)
1727	            sdVaccum = cute.make_tensor(sVaccum_ptr, sdVaccum_layout)
1728	            tiled_copy_dKVaccum_r2s = cute.make_tiled_copy_tv(
1729	                cute.make_copy_atom(cute.nvgpu.CopyUniversalOp(), Float32, num_bits_per_copy=128),
1730	                cute.make_layout((self.num_threads_per_warp_group, self.num_wg_mma)),
1731	                cute.make_layout(128 // Float32.width),
1732	            )
1733	            thr_copy_dKVaccum_r2s = tiled_copy_dKVaccum_r2s.get_slice(tidx)
1734	            tdKsdKaccum = thr_copy_dKVaccum_r2s.partition_D(sdKaccum)
1735	            tdVsdVaccum = thr_copy_dKVaccum_r2s.partition_D(sdVaccum)
1736	
1737	            read_flag = const_expr(not deterministic_KV)
1738	            cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_wait_group(0, read=read_flag)
1739	            if const_expr(deterministic_KV):
1740	                barrier.wait_eq(mdK_semaphore_cur.iterator, tidx, 0, lock_value)
1741	            epi_barrier.arrive_and_wait()
1742	            tdKrdKaccum_flat = cute.make_tensor(acc_dK.iterator, tdKsdKaccum.shape)
1743	            cute.autovec_copy(tdKrdKaccum_flat, tdKsdKaccum)
1744	            cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
1745	            epi_barrier.arrive_and_wait()
1746	            if warp_idx == 4:
1747	                with cute.arch.elect_one():
1748	                    for wg_idx in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_wg_mma):
1749	                        copy_utils.cpasync_reduce_bulk_add_f32(
1750	                            sdKaccum[None, wg_idx].iterator,
1751	                            gdKaccum[None, wg_idx].iterator,
1752	                            self.tma_copy_bytes["dKacc"] // self.num_wg_mma,
1753	                        )
1754	                cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_commit_group()
1755	
1756	            cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_wait_group(0, read=read_flag)
1757	            if const_expr(deterministic_KV):
1758	                barrier.arrive_inc(mdK_semaphore_cur.iterator, tidx, 0, 1)
1759	                barrier.wait_eq(mdV_semaphore_cur.iterator, tidx, 0, lock_value)
1760	            epi_barrier.arrive_and_wait()
1761	            tdVrdVaccum_flat = cute.make_tensor(acc_dV.iterator, tdVsdVaccum.shape)
1762	            cute.autovec_copy(tdVrdVaccum_flat, tdVsdVaccum)
1763	            cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
1764	            epi_barrier.arrive_and_wait()
1765	            if warp_idx == 4:
1766	                with cute.arch.elect_one():
1767	                    for wg_idx in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_wg_mma):
1768	                        copy_utils.cpasync_reduce_bulk_add_f32(
1769	                            sdVaccum[None, wg_idx].iterator,
1770	                            gdVaccum[None, wg_idx].iterator,
1771	                            self.tma_copy_bytes["dVacc"] // self.num_wg_mma,
1772	                        )
1773	                cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_commit_group()
1774	            if const_expr(deterministic_KV):
1775	                cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_wait_group(0, read=read_flag)
1776	                barrier.arrive_inc(mdV_semaphore_cur.iterator, tidx, 0, 1)

1778	    @cute.jit
1779	    def dQaccum_store(
1780	        self,
1781	        mdQaccum: cute.Tensor,
1782	        sdQaccum: cute.Tensor,
1783	        block_info: BlockInfo,
1784	        TileSchedulerCls: cutlass.Constexpr[Callable],
1785	        SeqlenInfoCls: cutlass.Constexpr[Callable],
1786	        blocksparse_tensors: Optional[BlockSparseTensors] = None,
1787	        mdQ_semaphore: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
1788	    ):
1789	        tidx, _, _ = cute.arch.thread_idx()
1790	        # warp-local thread index (dQaccum_store runs on warp 1, global tidx 32-63)
1791	        warp_local_tidx = tidx % cute.arch.WARP_SIZE
1792	        read_flag = const_expr(not self.deterministic)
1793	
1794	        tile_scheduler = TileSchedulerCls()
1795	        work_tile = tile_scheduler.initial_work_tile_info()
1796	        while work_tile.is_valid_tile:
1797	            n_block, head_idx, batch_idx, _ = work_tile.tile_idx
1798	            seqlen = SeqlenInfoCls(batch_idx)
1799	            if const_expr(not seqlen.has_cu_seqlens_q):
1800	                mdQaccum_cur = mdQaccum[None, head_idx, batch_idx]
1801	            else:
1802	                mdQaccum_cur = cute.domain_offset(
1803	                    (seqlen.padded_offset_q * self.tile_hdim,), mdQaccum[None, head_idx]
1804	                )
1805	            # ((M * K / num_wg_dQ, num_wg_dQ), num_m_blocks)
1806	            gdQaccum = cute.local_tile(
1807	                mdQaccum_cur,
1808	                (
1809	                    cute.make_layout(
1810	                        (self.tile_m * self.tile_hdim // self.num_wg_dQ, self.num_wg_dQ)
1811	                    ),
1812	                ),
1813	                (None,),
1814	            )
1815	
1816	            if const_expr(mdQ_semaphore is not None):
1817	                # mdQ_semaphore is (num_m_blocks, cluster_size, num_head, batch) after transpose
1818	                mdQ_semaphore_cur = mdQ_semaphore[None, None, head_idx, batch_idx]
1819	
1820	            m_block_min, m_block_max = block_info.get_m_block_min_max(seqlen, n_block)
1821	            if const_expr(not self.use_block_sparsity):
1822	                process_tile = (
1823	                    const_expr(not self.is_local and not self.is_varlen_q)
1824	                    or m_block_min < m_block_max
1825	                )
1826	                loop_count = m_block_max - m_block_min
1827	            else:
1828	                total_block_cnt = get_total_q_block_count_bwd(
1829	                    blocksparse_tensors,
1830	                    batch_idx,
1831	                    head_idx,
1832	                    n_block,
1833	                    q_subtile_factor=self.q_subtile_factor,
1834	                    m_block_max=m_block_max,
1835	                )
1836	                process_tile = total_block_cnt > Int32(0)
1837	
1838	            if process_tile:
1839	                if const_expr(not self.use_block_sparsity):
1840	                    for iter_idx in cutlass.range(loop_count, unroll=1):
1841	                        m_block = m_block_min + iter_idx
1842	                        m_block_safe = m_block
1843	
1844	                        num_dQ_chunks = self.num_wg_dQ
1845	                        for warp_group_idx in cutlass.range_constexpr(num_dQ_chunks):
1846	                            if const_expr(not self.deterministic):
1847	                                # If deterministic, we already waited at the end of the prev iter
1848	                                cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_wait_group(
1849	                                    num_dQ_chunks - 1 - warp_group_idx, read=read_flag
1850	                                )
1851	                            cute.arch.barrier_arrive(
1852	                                barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.dQEmptyWG0) + warp_group_idx,
1853	                                number_of_threads=self.num_threads_per_warp_group
1854	                                + cute.arch.WARP_SIZE,
1855	                            )
1856	
1857	                        # Semaphore acquire: wait for prior n_blocks to finish writing this m_block
1858	                        if const_expr(self.deterministic):
1859	                            if const_expr(self.spt):
1860	                                _, n_block_max_for_m_block = block_info.get_n_block_min_max(
1861	                                    seqlen, m_block_safe
1862	                                )
1863	                                lock_value = n_block_max_for_m_block - 1 - n_block
1864	                            else:
1865	                                lock_value = n_block
1866	                            barrier.wait_eq(
1867	                                mdQ_semaphore_cur[(m_block_safe, None)].iterator,
1868	                                warp_local_tidx,
1869	                                0,  # flag_offset
1870	                                lock_value,
1871	                            )
1872	
1873	                        for warp_group_idx in cutlass.range_constexpr(num_dQ_chunks):
1874	                            cute.arch.barrier(
1875	                                barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.dQFullWG0) + warp_group_idx,
1876	                                number_of_threads=self.num_threads_per_warp_group
1877	                                + cute.arch.WARP_SIZE,
1878	                            )
1879	                            with cute.arch.elect_one():
1880	                                copy_utils.cpasync_reduce_bulk_add_f32(
1881	                                    sdQaccum[None, warp_group_idx].iterator,
1882	                                    gdQaccum[(None, warp_group_idx), m_block_safe].iterator,
1883	                                    self.tma_copy_bytes["dQ"],
1884	                                )
1885	                            cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_commit_group()
1886	
1887	                        # Semaphore release: signal that this n_block is done with this m_block
1888	                        if const_expr(self.deterministic):
1889	                            cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_wait_group(0, read=read_flag)
1890	                            barrier.arrive_inc(
1891	                                mdQ_semaphore_cur[(m_block_safe, None)].iterator,
1892	                                warp_local_tidx,
1893	                                0,  # flag_offset
1894	                                1,
1895	                            )
1896	                else:
1897	                    assert not self.deterministic, (
1898	                        "Deterministic not implemented for block-sparse backward"
1899	                    )
1900	                    dQaccum_store_block_sparse_bwd_sm90(
1901	                        blocksparse_tensors,
1902	                        batch_idx,
1903	                        head_idx,
1904	                        n_block,
1905	                        sdQaccum,
1906	                        gdQaccum,
1907	                        q_subtile_factor=self.q_subtile_factor,
1908	                        m_block_max=m_block_max,
1909	                        num_dQ_warp_groups=self.num_wg_dQ,
1910	                        num_threads_per_warp_group=self.num_threads_per_warp_group,
1911	                        tma_copy_bytes_dQ=self.tma_copy_bytes["dQ"],
1912	                    )
1913	
1914	            # For local masking + deterministic (non-spt): signal remaining m_blocks
1915	            # that this n_block won't visit, so they don't deadlock waiting.
1916	            if const_expr(
1917	                self.deterministic and not self.spt and block_info.window_size_left is not None
1918	            ):
1919	                m_block_global_max = cute.ceil_div(seqlen.seqlen_q, self.tile_m)
1920	                for m_block in cutlass.range(m_block_max, m_block_global_max, unroll=1):
1921	                    barrier.arrive_inc(
1922	                        mdQ_semaphore_cur[(m_block, None)].iterator,
1923	                        warp_local_tidx,
1924	                        0,  # flag_offset
1925	                        1,
1926	                    )
1927	
1928	            tile_scheduler.advance_to_next_work()
1929	            work_tile = tile_scheduler.get_current_work()
1930	
1931	        if const_expr(not self.deterministic):
1932	            cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_wait_group(0, read=True)

import math
from typing import Callable, Optional, Type
from functools import partial

import cuda.bindings.driver as cuda

import cutlass
import cutlass.cute as cute
import cutlass.utils.hopper_helpers as sm90_utils_basic
from cutlass.cute.nvgpu import cpasync, warpgroup
from cutlass.cute import FastDivmodDivisor
from cutlass import Float32, Int32, Boolean, const_expr
from cutlass.utils import LayoutEnum

from quack import copy_utils
from quack import layout_utils
from quack import sm90_utils
from quack.sm90_utils import gemm_zero_init, gemm_w_idx

from flash_attn.cute.cute_dsl_utils import assume_tensor_aligned
from flash_attn.cute import utils
from flash_attn.cute.mask import AttentionMask
from flash_attn.cute.seqlen_info import SeqlenInfoQK
from flash_attn.cute.block_info import BlockInfo
from flash_attn.cute import pipeline
from quack.cute_dsl_utils import ParamsBase
from flash_attn.cute.tile_scheduler import (
    TileSchedulerArguments,
    SingleTileScheduler,
    SingleTileLPTBwdScheduler,
    SingleTileVarlenScheduler,
)
from flash_attn.cute import barrier
from flash_attn.cute.named_barrier import NamedBarrierBwd
from flash_attn.cute.softmax import apply_score_mod_inner, apply_score_mod_bwd_inner
from flash_attn.cute.block_sparsity import BlockSparseTensors
from flash_attn.cute.utils import AuxData
from flash_attn.cute.block_sparse_utils import (
    get_total_q_block_count_bwd,
    produce_block_sparse_q_loads_bwd_sm90,
    consume_block_sparse_mma_bwd_sm90,
    dQaccum_store_block_sparse_bwd_sm90,
)


class FlashAttentionBackwardSm90:
    arch = 90

    def __init__(
        self,
        dtype: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
        head_dim: int,
        head_dim_v: Optional[int] = None,
        qhead_per_kvhead: int = 1,
        is_causal: bool = False,
        is_local: bool = False,
        deterministic: bool = False,
        tile_m: int = 64,
        tile_n: int = 128,
        Q_stage: int = 2,
        dO_stage: int = 2,
        PdS_stage: int = 2,
        SdP_swapAB: bool = False,
        dKV_swapAB: bool = False,
        dQ_swapAB: bool = False,
        AtomLayoutMSdP: int = 1,
        AtomLayoutNdKV: int = 2,
        AtomLayoutMdQ: int = 1,
        num_threads: int = 384,
        V_in_regs: bool = False,
        score_mod: cutlass.Constexpr | None = None,
        score_mod_bwd: cutlass.Constexpr | None = None,
        mask_mod: cutlass.Constexpr | None = None,
        has_aux_tensors: cutlass.Constexpr = False,
        q_subtile_factor: cutlass.Constexpr[int] = 1,
        dQ_single_wg: bool = False,
    ):
        self.dtype = dtype
        # padding head_dim to a multiple of 16 as k_block_size
        hdim_multiple_of = 16
        self.tile_hdim = int(math.ceil(head_dim / hdim_multiple_of) * hdim_multiple_of)
        head_dim_v = head_dim_v if head_dim_v is not None else head_dim
        self.same_hdim_kv = head_dim == head_dim_v
        self.tile_hdimv = int(math.ceil(head_dim_v / hdim_multiple_of) * hdim_multiple_of)
        # Can save registers (and hence be faster) if we don't have to check hdim predication
        self.check_hdim_oob = head_dim != self.tile_hdim
        self.check_hdim_v_oob = head_dim_v != self.tile_hdimv
        self.qhead_per_kvhead = qhead_per_kvhead
        self.is_causal = is_causal
        self.is_local = is_local
        self.deterministic = deterministic
        self.tile_m = tile_m
        self.tile_n = tile_n
        self.num_threads = num_threads
        self.Q_stage = Q_stage
        self.dO_stage = dO_stage
        self.PdS_stage = PdS_stage
        assert self.dO_stage in [1, self.Q_stage]
        assert self.PdS_stage in [1, self.Q_stage]
        self.SdP_swapAB = SdP_swapAB
        self.dKV_swapAB = dKV_swapAB
        self.dQ_swapAB = dQ_swapAB
        self.AtomLayoutMSdP = AtomLayoutMSdP
        self.AtomLayoutNdKV = AtomLayoutNdKV
        self.AtomLayoutMdQ = AtomLayoutMdQ
        self.num_wg_mma = (self.num_threads // 128) - 1
        self.mma_dkv_is_rs = (
            AtomLayoutMSdP == 1
            and AtomLayoutNdKV == self.num_wg_mma
            and SdP_swapAB
            and not dKV_swapAB
        )
        self.V_in_regs = V_in_regs
        # May be overridden in __call__ for varlen inputs.
        if qhead_per_kvhead > 1:
            assert self.same_hdim_kv, "GQA backward requires head_dim == head_dim_v"
            assert self.num_wg_mma == 2, "GQA backward assumes 2 warp groups"
        # These are tuned for speed
        # Do we keep the LSE and dPsum in each thread, or split them across 8 threads that share
        # them and then shuffle to get the value whenever we need? This can reduce register
        # pressure when SdP_swapAB, where each thread needs to keep statistics for (kBlockM / 4)
        # rows. If !SdP_swapAB, each thread only needs to keep statistics for 2 rows.
        self.shuffle_LSE = self.SdP_swapAB and self.tile_hdim <= 64
        self.shuffle_dPsum = self.SdP_swapAB and self.tile_hdim <= 64

        self.buffer_align_bytes = 1024

        self.score_mod = score_mod
        self.score_mod_bwd = score_mod_bwd
        self.mask_mod = mask_mod
        self.has_aux_tensors = has_aux_tensors
        self.q_subtile_factor = q_subtile_factor
        if cutlass.const_expr(has_aux_tensors):
            self.vec_size: cutlass.Constexpr = 1
        else:
            self.vec_size: cutlass.Constexpr = 4
        self.qk_acc_dtype = Float32
        # dQ_single_wg: WG0 computes the full dQ GEMM, WG1 skips it.
        # Only valid for 2 MMA warp groups.
        # Credit: Ben Spector
        if dQ_single_wg:
            assert self.num_wg_mma == 2, "dQ_single_wg only supports 2 warp groups"
        self.num_wg_dQ = 1 if dQ_single_wg else self.num_wg_mma

    @staticmethod
    def can_implement(
        dtype,
        head_dim,
        head_dim_v,
        tile_m,
        tile_n,
        Q_stage,
        num_threads,
        V_in_regs=False,
    ) -> bool:
        if dtype not in [cutlass.Float16, cutlass.BFloat16]:
            return False
        if head_dim % 8 != 0:
            return False
        if head_dim_v % 8 != 0:
            return False
        if tile_n % 16 != 0:
            return False
        if num_threads % 32 != 0:
            return False
        if (tile_m * 2) % num_threads != 0:
            return False
        return True

    def _check_type(
        self,
        mQ_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
        mK_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
        mV_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
        mdO_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
        mLSE_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
        mdPsum_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
        mdQaccum_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
        mdK_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
